meaning: 神户[日本本州岛西南岸港市]
examples: The kids of Kobe try to be as stoic as their parents in this tragic situation.
My favorite sports star is Kobe Bryant.
The disastrous Hanshin earthquake in 1995 killed 6,400 people, toppled elevated highways, flattened office blocks and devastated the port area of Kobe.
Bruce's latest restaurant menu of Kobe beef and Maine Pemaquid oysters is worth travelling to experience.
Following a year-long lockout, Kobe would enter the 2011 regular season at 33 years old.
